title: Spicy Aubergine Stew with Herby Rice
summary: A fiery, smoky aubergine stew using our Aubergine Alla Norma batch, served over herby rice with a cooling yoghurt dollop. Lazy dinner vibes with full-on flavour.

method.description: Make the Aubergine Alla Norma batch recipe.
Pick the parsley leaves, set a few aside for garnish and finely chop the rest.
Stir the harissa into the aubergine alla norma and warm it through in a saucepan over a medium heat. Taste and season with salt and black pepper, if needed.
Reheat the rice according to pack instructions. Stir through the chopped parsley.
Spoon the herby rice onto plates, then top with the spicy aubergine stew and a generous dollop of yoghurt. Finish with the reserved parsley leaves.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
